_comment: REAL captured cross-filing restatement (never hand-typed), machine-captured exact-integer via edgartools extract_dimensional_revenue. INTC ClientComputingGroup segment revenue for FY2020 (period_end 2020-12-26) was RECAST between the FY2021 10-K (accession 0000050863-22-000007, filed 2022-01-27, value 40057000000.0) and the FY2022 10-K (accession 0000050863-23-000006, filed 2023-01-27, value 40535000000.0): SAME (concept, dimensions, consolidation, period_end), DIFFERENT value, DIFFERENT accession. Verified live 2026-07-15. Overlap policy C keeps the most-recently-filed value and emits a restatement DQC flag. | AUGMENTED 2026-07-18 (T5, docs/loom/plans/2026-07-16-operational-kpi-quarterly.md): every fact now carries the producer's parallel period-label group (duration_months=12 — all facts here are annual 10-K facts — calendar_year/calendar_quarter, fiscal_year/fiscal_quarter, derivation_basis) derived by the REAL sec_edgar_client._derive_fiscal_label against each filer's nominal dei calendar (AAPL --09-27, NFLX --12-31, INTC --12-26), mirroring the current producer emission (docs/loom/memory/fixtures-mirror-producer-shape.md). The raw edgartools fiscal_year column value is REPLACED by the honest derived label. | AUGMENTED 2026-07-18 (T9, docs/loom/plans/2026-07-16-operational-kpi-quarterly.md): added the pack-level per-accession `fiscal_calendars` map the producer has emitted since T3 (fiscal_period_focus=FY for these 10-K accessions, nominal fiscal_year_end per the filer convention above, fiscal_year_focus = the fiscal year each 10-K reports) — the channel facts_to_points now requires to ground every point's source_form (10-K|10-Q); no fact values touched.
